input_assets.source_image: Input Image (ANY type) - Extract: color palette, patterns, textures, mood, visual motifs â†’ translate into nail art design language

workflow.step_1: Extract aesthetics from image: dominant/secondary/accent colors, patterns, textures, mood, motifs
workflow.step_2: Map aesthetics to nail design: colorsâ†’base/tip/gradient, patternsâ†’surface, texturesâ†’finish, motifsâ†’embellishments/3D, moodâ†’aesthetic

prompt_structure.opening: Close-up of 5 press-on nails, [finish] [base color] base [transition],

Each nail must have unique design derived from image aesthetics; closing keywords must reflect SOURCE IMAGE mood
Aesthetic translation: garmentâ†’fabric drapeâ†’gradient, sceneryâ†’tonesâ†’palette, artâ†’brushstrokesâ†’texture, objectâ†’materialâ†’finish
